full_text:
Wang Chen (Chudao) 王沈 (處道)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Chen (王沈), styledChudao (處道), was born in Jinyang county, Taiyuan commandery. Compiled Wei-shu, the offical history of Wei. Betrayed Cao Mao’s revolt to Sima Zhao. Wang Chen was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Wang Chen lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
